top_signals.title: US tells Europe, Canada to boost NATO air and naval forces
top_signals.summary: “Nations just need to assign the capabilities they have to NATO,” a spokesman for the alliance's military headquarters said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of Japan expected to raise rates this month, sources say - Reuters

top_signals.title: S&P Dow Jones Keeps MegaCap IPO Rules As Is After Consultation
top_signals.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices will keep its existing eligibility requirements for the S&P 500, rejecting proposals that would have made it faster for mega-cap companies such as SpaceX to gain rapid entry into the benchmark after going public.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Port of Los Angeles Debuts Hybrid Cruise Vessel
top_signals.summary: A new hybrid, 350-passenger vessel is now in operation at the Port of Los Angeles, the result of a Port-led partnership with Harbor Breeze Cruises, the California Air Resources Board (CARB), and the Port of Long Beach.The Harbor Breeze Cruises’…

top_signals.title: 2026 Justice Scoreboard highlights importance of effective justice systems for EU competitiveness and Single Market
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 04 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission published the fourteenth edition of the EU Justice Scoreboard, an annual report providing comparative data on the efficiency, quality, and independence of the justice systems among EU Member States.
